rule: Implement ONE feature at a time. Mark passing ONLY with command evidence.

features.description: Split a document body into citable chunks.
features.acceptance: POST /api/index/:id returns chunks > 0; index file stores chunks[] with {i,text}.
Index record includes metadata {chars, words, chunkCount}.

features.description: Show what is indexed vs pending.
features.evidence: before: indexed 0 pending [welcome]; after: indexed 1 pending [] totalChunks 3.

features.description: Answer questions from indexed chunks, with a citation.
features.acceptance: POST /api/ask {q} returns {answer, citation:{document, chunk}} from a real chunk.
